summary: Build W14 (~20 mi) — test week. Wed is the mid-build test (3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T, §10): it arbitrates the held T pace 7:50-7:55 (RPE 8+ there → drop 10 s/mi, Adj #166) and the calendar placement of the two spare weeks is decided by it (Adj #167). Tue bump slate: incline 150→155 + AMRAP @ 135 (Adj #168), pushdown 25→27.5 pain-gated (Adj #183). Fri progresses VO2 to 6x3 min @ I on 2:30 rec — keep reps in-band 7:10-7:25 (Adj #178). Mon easy banked but hill strides skipped again — unperformed since W10, next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194). Sat Hyp B is all holds/rebuilds, no scheduled bump.

days.note: Logged — 35 min treadmill @ 10:31/mi avg, 0.5% incline, ~3.3 mi; cadence 169; HR avg 164 (display-only); no pain reported = clean by default (Adj #188). Hill strides SKIPPED — unperformed since W10 Mon 6-22, next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 155 bump + pushdown 27.5 attempt
days.note: Incline 1x5 @ 155 + AMRAP @ 135; if 155x5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 150 (Adj #168). Pushdown 25→27.5 attempt, pain-gated — a symptomatic elbow read resets the §10.A clock (Adj #183). Holds: preacher 70 (Adj #170), DB lateral 30 (Adj #169), rear-delt 135 — repeat RIR 4 opener → nudge 140 (Adj #173), crunch +10 rebuild to 3x12 (Adj #172).

days.session: W14 TEST — 3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T (§10)
days.note: Arbitrates T: should feel exactly RPE 7 at 7:50-7:55; RPE 8+ → drop paces 10 s/mi (Adj #166). Calendar placement of the two spare weeks decided off this test (Adj #167). First quality outing in the Vomero Plus (Adj #193). If treadmill: 1% incline (Adj #177).

days.session: Off — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab

days.note: Second I-pace session — shorter recoveries do the progressing; keep reps in-band 7:10-7:25, no off-band closer (Adj #178). Fast end earned after this lands (Adj #176).

days.session: Long run 60 min Z1 AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
days.note: No scheduled bump — all holds/rebuilds: row 80 re-earn ladder (Adj #180); calf 355 sets 1-3 ≥RIR 1 before 365, AM-gated (Adj #185); lat 165 → 170 on clean 4x8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #179); DB lateral 35 all-4-in-band (Adj #181); preacher 60 (Adj #182); crunch +10 set 3 gate (Adj #184). Pushdown Sat load depends on Tue's 27.5 attempt (Adj #183).

days.session: Off / SI prehab — Tyler twists, reverse Tyler, McGill Big 3
